# AmberNord

> AmberNord is a Swiss producer of premium organic sea-buckthorn (Sanddorn) elixir — single-origin Nordic berries, 100% hand-harvested and cold-pressed into a pure daily concentrate marketed as "the liquid gold of the North." Founded by Eriks Matisons and made by a small manufactory in Aarau, Switzerland.

AmberNord makes one thing exceptionally well: a pure, organic sea-buckthorn essence taken as a 30-second daily ritual. The berries are single-origin and fully traceable from the Nordic coast, gently hand-harvested and cold-pressed (Zero-Waste) to preserve the full spectrum of the fruit. Each 250 ml bottle is a concentrate — the recommended "1:10 protocol" mixes 1 part essence with 10 parts still or sparkling water, ideally in the morning on an empty stomach.

Key facts about the product:

- 190+ bioactive compounds from a single botanical source.
- Naturally high in Vitamin C — roughly 9× that of citrus fruit. Vitamin C contributes to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue and to the normal function of the immune system.
- One of nature's rarest plant sources of Omega-7 (palmitoleic acid) — up to 42% of the pulp oil — alongside Omega 3, 6 and 9.
- 100% hand-harvested, cold-pressed, single-origin and fully traceable.
- Certified organic: ProCert (CH-BIO-038, certificate ID 141710) and EU Organic.
- Ships within 24h from Aarau, Switzerland, with a 30-day money-back guarantee. Payment via TWINT, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Visa and Mastercard.

This site is a single-page application; the URLs below are the prerendered, crawlable pages. Content is available in German (the canonical root, https://ambernord.ch/), English (/en/), French (/fr/) and Italian (/it/). The links below point to the English versions.

## Products

- [The Starter — 1× 250 ml, CHF 24.90](https://ambernord.ch/en/shop/starter/): Single bottle — the entry point to try the daily ritual.
- [The Habit — 3× 250 ml, CHF 69.00](https://ambernord.ch/en/shop/habit/): Three-bottle pack to establish a consistent routine.
- [The Protocol — 6× 250 ml, CHF 129.00](https://ambernord.ch/en/shop/protocol/): Six-bottle supply for the full protocol.
- [The Master Box — 20× 250 ml, CHF 370.00](https://ambernord.ch/en/shop/master-box/): Bulk ritual box, best value per bottle.
- [Shop overview](https://ambernord.ch/en/shop/): All products and current pricing.

## Brand & Science

- [Home](https://ambernord.ch/en/): Brand overview and the daily ritual.
- [Story](https://ambernord.ch/en/story/): The origin and philosophy behind AmberNord.
- [Science (Wissenschaft)](https://ambernord.ch/en/wissenschaft/): The evidence dossier — compounds, sourcing and sourced claims.
- [The Ritual](https://ambernord.ch/en/ritual/): How to use the essence (the 1:10 protocol) and why.
- [Reviews (Bewertungen)](https://ambernord.ch/en/bewertungen/): Customer reviews and experiences.

## Help & Support

- [FAQ](https://ambernord.ch/en/hilfe/faq/): Common questions on the product, usage, shipping and returns.

- [Returns (Rückgabe)](https://ambernord.ch/en/hilfe/rueckgabe/): The 30-day money-back guarantee and return process.
- [Order status (Bestellstatus)](https://ambernord.ch/en/hilfe/bestellstatus/): Check the status of an existing order.
